explanation: OpenAI GPT-OSS 120B with FP4 quantization for production deployment on H200 GPUs. Based on InferenceMAX benchmarks, this configuration uses 8-way tensor parallelism with async scheduling for high throughput. The gpt-oss-120b model achieves near-parity with OpenAI o4-mini on core reasoning benchmarks while running efficiently on modern hardware.
short_explanation: GPT-OSS 120B FP4 on 8xH200 with high throughput
